dialogue.speaker: DREK
dialogue.line: "I've got a new case for you, Kaida. Some rich socialite's daughter is missing."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of DREK, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: KAIDA
dialogue.line: "You're telling me this girl was here last night, and now she's gone?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAIDA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: BENJAMIN
dialogue.line: "That's right. She was with some friends, dancing and having a good time. But then she vanished."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of BENJAMIN, expression intense and focused.
